title: Ukrainian Drone Strike on Sevastopol Kills 1, Wounds 3
detail: A Ukrainian drone attack on Sevastopol in occupied Crimea killed 1 person and wounded 3 others. Russia's Moscow-installed governor of Sevastopol reported that Russian air defense shot down 43 Ukrainian drones during the attack. The operation continues Ukraine's sustained campaign against Russian Black Sea Fleet infrastructure and logistics in occupied Crimea. The Black Sea Fleet has been severely degraded by years of Ukrainian naval drone strikes, forcing Russia to relocate its remaining vessels from Sevastopol to Novorossiysk.

media.caption: Ukrainian drone strike on Sevastopol kills one person, Russia shoots down 43 drones

title: 149 Combat Engagements Recorded Across Ukrainian Front — Russia Deploys 9,658 Drones
detail: Ukraine's General Staff reported 149 combat engagements in 24 hours across multiple front sectors. Russia launched 2 missile strikes using 50 missiles, 66 airstrikes, 203 guided aerial bombs, and deployed 9,658 kamikaze drones. Ukrainian air defense suppressed or destroyed the majority of incoming weapons. Fighting continued across the Donetsk, Zaporizhzhia, and Kherson fronts as Russian forces attempted advances in multiple directions. Ukrainian forces maintained defensive positions while employing FPV drones and artillery to destroy Russian equipment and impede assaults.

media.caption: 149 combat engagements across Ukrainian fronts as Russia deploys thousands of drones
